title: Rules System Index
description: Fundamental rules and mechanics for playing Dungeons & Dragons 5e 2024

overview.description: This chapter provides an overview of how to play D&D and focuses on the big picture. Many places in this chapter reference the Rules Glossary.
overview.imagination: Imagination is a key ingredient of Dungeons & Dragons, a cooperative game in which the characters that you roleplay embark on adventures together in fantasy worlds filled with monsters and magic.
overview.collaborative: In D&D, the action takes place in the imaginations of the players, and it's narrated by everyone together.

Passing time and pacing
Taking breaks and managing fatigue

components.title: Magic Item JSON Schema
components.description: Schema defining JSON structure and validation for all magic items
components.location: Root directory - defines structure for magic-items/ directory
contains: 13 required/optional properties for magic item JSON
id (unique identifier)
name (display name)
rarity (Common to Artifact)
category (9 types)
attunement_required (boolean)
description (full item description)
properties (array of tags)
effect (mechanical effects)
activation (how to use)
attunement (if required, conditions/restrictions)
consumable (single-use boolean)
curse (curse properties if applicable)
sentience (sentient item attributes)
crafting (crafting requirements and time)
source (publication source)

key_concepts.core_mechanic: D20 Tests - roll a d20 to determine success or failure
key_concepts.rhythm_pattern: DM describes scene → Players describe actions → DM narrates results
key_concepts.rounding_rule: Always round down unless told otherwise
key_concepts.advantage_principle: Roll two d20s, use higher for Advantage or lower for Disadvantage
key_concepts.one_thing_at_a_time: You can take only one action at a time
key_concepts.combat_timing: Rounds (6 seconds each) divided into turns in initiative order
key_concepts.critical_hits: Natural 20 on attack = automatic hit + double damage dice
key_concepts.conditions_exist: 15 temporary states (Blinded, Charmed, etc.) that alter capabilities
key_concepts.condition_stacking: Multiple instances don't stack (except Exhaustion levels)

d20_test_summary.procedure: Roll 1d20 + ability modifier + proficiency bonus (if applicable) + other modifiers

critical_results.natural_20: Automatic hit on attack rolls (Critical Hit)

per_turn.reaction: One per round (resets at start of next turn)
per_turn.movement: Up to your Speed (can be broken up)

combat_summary.initiative: Dexterity check determines turn order (same each round)
combat_summary.turn_structure: Move + Action + Bonus Action (if available) + Free Interaction
combat_summary.reactions: One per round, reset at start of your turn

damage_summary.critical_hits: Natural 20 = double damage dice + normal modifiers
damage_summary.death_saves: DC 10, three successes = stable, three failures = death
damage_summary.conditions: 15 total states that impose temporary effects on creatures

game_structure.campaign: TV series - multiple adventures with overarching narrative
